𝗖𝗖𝗣𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗧 | Enabling developers to remotely control and interact with AI coding agents (like Codex and Claude) from their mobile devices or desktops, facilitating a more flexible and accessible development workflow.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Dart 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling developers to remotely control and interact with AI coding agents (like Codex and Claude) from their mobile devices or desktops, facilitating a more flexible and accessible development workflow.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Control Codex and Claude coding agents from mobile and desktop
✅ Remote session management and action approval
✅ Cross-device context persistence
✅ Workspace exploration and Git integration
✅ Rich prompt writing with Markdown, voice, and image input
✅ Offline message queuing and recovery
✅ Parallel session management with separate worktrees
✅ Machine management (host saving, discovery, SSH control)
✅ Adaptive UI for various screen sizes (phone, tablet, desktop)


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 885 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 79 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

CC Pocket is a mobile and desktop application that allows users to control coding agent sessions (Codex and Claude) remotely via a self-hosted WebSocket bridge server. It enables users to start, manage, and approve agent actions from their phone, tablet, or desktop, offering a seamless coding experience across devices.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/K9i-0/ccpocket

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗗𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥-𝗣𝗜-𝗛𝗢𝗟𝗘 | To provide a simple and reliable way to deploy Pi-hole as a network-wide ad blocker using Docker.  🌟 Rising Fast!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a simple and reliable way to deploy Pi-hole as a network-wide ad blocker using Docker.
📅 Created: Feb 2016 • Updated: Jun 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Official Pi-hole Docker image
✅ Network-wide ad blocking
✅ DNS sinkhole functionality
✅ Easy deployment with Docker Compose
✅ Customizable environment variables for configuration
✅ Volume persistence for data and configuration


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 11.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides the official Docker image for Pi-hole, a network-wide ad blocker and DNS sinkhole. It allows users to easily deploy Pi-hole in a containerized environment for efficient ad blocking across their entire network.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/pi-hole/docker-pi-hole

𝗠𝗚𝗥𝗘𝗣 | To provide a natural language interface for searching and retrieving information from local files and the web, particularly useful for developers and AI agents.  🔥 Super Hot!

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a natural language interface for searching and retrieving information from local files and the web, particularly useful for developers and AI agents.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Natural-language search
✅ Semantic, multilingual, and multimodal search capabilities
✅ Built-in web search (--web)
✅ Background indexing with `mgrep watch`
✅ Friendly device-login flow
✅ First-class coding agent integrations
✅ Reduced token usage for agents
✅ Support for code, text, and PDFs (audio/video coming soon)


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 170 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 42 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

mgrep is a command-line tool that enables semantic searching across various file types, including code, text, and PDFs, using natural language queries. It features background indexing, web search integration, and is designed for both human and agent use, aiming to reduce token usage for AI agents.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/mixedbread-ai/mgrep

𝗟𝗘𝗧𝗨𝗕𝗘-𝗕𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡𝗗 | To provide a robust and scalable backend infrastructure for a video hosting and live streaming platform.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a robust and scalable backend infrastructure for a video hosting and live streaming platform.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Video hosting service
✅ Live streaming
✅ VOD (Video on Demand)
✅ HLS adaptive streaming
✅ FFmpeg transcoding
✅ S3-compatible storage
✅ Microservices architecture
✅ RabbitMQ for task queuing
✅ NestJS framework
✅ CQRS pattern


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 17 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LeTube Backend is a microservices-based backend for a video hosting platform, supporting both Video on Demand (VOD) and live streaming. It leverages HLS for adaptive streaming, FFmpeg for transcoding, and S3-compatible storage for media files, with RabbitMQ for asynchronous task processing.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗕𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚 | Developing and playing in persistent, AI-driven fantasy role-playing games with rich narrative and intelligent NPCs.  🔍 Worth a Look

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Developing and playing in persistent, AI-driven fantasy role-playing games with rich narrative and intelligent NPCs.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Layered World Building (L1, L2, L3)
✅ Graph-First Knowledge Management with self-healing graph
✅ Self-Optimising Memory (FAISS-accelerated, time-based partitioning)
✅ Deterministic Probability System for actions
✅ Advanced Romance and Birth/Isekai systems
✅ Living Narrative Director for dynamic story progression
✅ Immersive Roleplay with LLM respecting player agency
✅ Unified CLI and Web UI with dashboards
✅ One-Command New Game setup


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

⭐ 9 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 3 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

BRING v2 is a production-ready, AI-powered platform for creating persistent fantasy worlds with interactive roleplaying. It combines generative world building, graph-based knowledge management, and LLM-driven narrative orchestration with FAISS-accelerated memory for intelligent NPCs and dynamic storytelling.

GitOS is an open-source operating system project built collaboratively by a global community. It features a custom bootloader written in NASM assembly and a modular kernel developed in C++, aiming for a minimalist, console-based user interface.
